meaning: v.疾跑 美国著名的通讯公司
examples: She won in a sprint finish.
Rob Harmeling won the sprint in Bordeaux.
Gilles Delion, of France, won the Tour of Lombardy in a sprint finish at Monza yesterday.
Sprint PCS now has its own equity analyst following (32), more than parent Sprint (28).
The FreedomPop Overdrive Pro becomes the company's first device to run on Sprint's network.
